channel.title: GitHub-Hosted Runners on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in GitHub-Hosted Runners on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: github: New runner images in public preview
item.description:
GitHub has added two new GitHub-hosted runner images for Actions in public preview. They are available to all users so workflows can be tested on the latest platforms before general release.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Custom images for GitHub-hosted runners are now generally available
item.description:
Custom images for GitHub-hosted runners are now generally available. The feature, first released in public preview in October 2025, lets users build on GitHub-curated base images for hosted runners.

  • Source: GitHub
